📰 Latest News

What's Happening at Marketonomy

Announcements, milestones, new tracks, and everything in between.

📣 Featured Announcement
📅 May 2025Cohort News
Cohort 2 Is Now Open — Applications Live for All 5 Skill Tracks
After a successful first cohort, Marketonomy is proud to open Cohort 2 across all five tracks — Graphics Design, Digital Marketing, Front-End Dev, AI & ML, and Trading. New restructured modules, more mentor touchpoints, and a peer community channel. Spots are limited.
Apply Now — Cohort 2 →
02
📅 April 2025Platform Update
Mentor Applications Now Open — Earn While You Teach
Verified professionals in any of our five skill tracks can now apply to become a Marketonomy mentor. Build your brand, impact lives, and earn from every session.
Apply as Mentor →
03
📅 March 2025Milestone
Cohort 1 Wraps Up — 94% Report Career Impact
Our inaugural graphics design cohort concluded with outstanding reviews. Students completed real-world brand projects and walked away with portfolio-ready work.
Read Student Stories →
04
📅 February 2025New Track
AI & Machine Learning Track Officially Launches
28 modules, 58 verified mentors, from Python fundamentals to real LLM-powered app deployment. The AI track is live and accepting students now.
Explore the Track →
05
📅 January 2025Partnership
Marketonomy Partners with Graphico for Advanced Design Classes
A formalised training partnership bringing structured curriculum to students across Nigeria — covering Color Psychology, Typography, Branding, and Concept Development.
See Our Sessions →
